title: 18: Dark Noise 2 & Spend Stack 1.2 with Jordan Morgan
description:
After releasing his big Dark Noise 2 update, Charlie takes a little break and hangs out with Jordan Morgan, who recently released Spend Stack 1.2, to talk about launching and marketing a major update to an existing app on the store. Links & Show Notes Spend Stack 1.2
